text: Many people stand in an open square with umbrellas on a grey day.
Three people riding on a elephant with two in a basket on the back.
An empty bench on an empty sidewalk in front of some shops.
The warehouse holds several used toilets on the dusty floor.
A woman and child posing for a photograph with a stroller.
A small bowl of bread pudding served on a plate
A bowl of various fresh store bought fruit
Sheep graze along a wooden fence as a photographer studies them from a stairway.
Little girl holding a heavy stick with bananas attached to it.
A man without a shirt is taking food from a bowl in a kitchen
